reviews.comment:
Siempre me atiene un joven llamado Heber en forma extraordinaria
Desde hace muchos años asisto a esta estación de Acá y ha mantenido la insuperable atención , con dedicación y respeto

(Translated by Google)
I always receive exceptional service from a young man named Heber.
I've been coming to this station here for many years, and he has consistently provided outstanding service, with dedication and respect.

reviews.comment:
La ubicacion es buena, el full siempre te salva, y por lo general se siente seguro, y hago esa última aclaracion xq a veces no tenes dnd esperar sin que te roben cuando llegas a la terminal. Mc donalds y la full son lo mas

(Translated by Google)
The location is good, the Full service is always a lifesaver, and it generally feels safe. I mention that last point because sometimes you don't have anywhere to wait without getting robbed when you arrive at the terminal. McDonald's and the Full service are the best.

¡Te esperamos nuevamente!
